arts.ttl: I played in goal for Manchester United - now I'm trying to plot Andre Onana's downfall
arts.sum: Lee Grant spent four years at Man Utd but after retiring he went into coaching and now works with the strikers at Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes confident Manchester United claim - but admits he could be wrong
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho was the new Manchester United manager's mentor, but Ruben Amorim insists that he isn't 'The Special One' - and was far more humble than his compatriot ever managed during his Premier League career

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim must rebuild Man United from the ground up - here's why the early signs show he might just have what it takes, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: It is always surprising how bleak the Carrington Training Centre can feel from the outside. The antithesis of what traditionally lay within the grounds.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher sends warning to Ruben Amorim over how Man Utd start could be 'ruined'
arts.sum: Many have tipped Ruben Amorim to restore Manchester United to the glory days they enjoyed under Sir Alex Ferguson - who won 13 Premier League trophies - but Jamie Carragher feels he could face a tough start

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's replacement makes PERFECT start to life at Sporting Lisbon as Portuguese champions SMASH rivals in 6-0 rout... and Man United target Viktor Gyokeres is on target again!
arts.sum: The league leaders, now managed by Joao Pereira, continued their perfect domestic record in Portugal with 14 wins in as many games.

arts.ttl: Manchester United must 'set better standards' says Ruben Amorim after Marcus Rashford and Casemiro criticism
arts.sum: Gary Neville took aim at Red Devils pair over their decisions to fly to the USA during the international break

arts.ttl: Man City 'firmly pursuing' 24-year-old Sporting wide man after Ruben Amorim rise
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly eyeing a summer move for Sporting Lisbon and Uruguay star Maxi Araujo as they target a new left-sided defender.

arts.sum: Chelsea eye move for Ipswich's Liam Delap, Liverpool and Arsenal battle for Real Sociedad's Martin Zubimendi, Joshua Zirkzee's Manchester United future in doubt.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United press conference: FIVE THINGS WE LEARNED as Portuguese coach fronted the media for the first time as Old Trafford boss
arts.sum: As well as his briefing with reporters, he sat down with ex-Man United star Gary Neville for a chat for Sky Sports. Mail Sport picks out five things we learned from those two media appearances
